overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a third-person character walking through a neon-lit cyberpunk city at night. The character traverses streets, plazas, staircases, and alleys in a futuristic Asian-inspired urban environment with heavy neon signage and mixed pedestrian activity.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered street under overpass with neon billboards

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the street under the overpass, passing by road barriers and neon signage

notable_agents.action: car with headlights on driving down the street toward the camera

entered.detail: tall illuminated billboard with purple and white graphics on the right side of the street
massive concrete overpass spanning the street overhead with support columns
metal guardrail with red and white stripes separating sidewalk from road

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a city street beneath a massive overpass structure. Neon billboards illuminate the right side while vehicles pass on the left. The environment is urban and cyberpunk-themed with red road markings and metal barriers lining the pedestrian walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza with outdoor seating and police presence

events.description: enters covered plaza area with red paper lanterns and outdoor seating
begins ascending concrete staircase with red railings

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza past a parked police car and biohazard truck, then ascending stairs

notable_agents.action: police car with flashing lights parked near the outdoor seating area
biohazard truck with yellow warning symbols parked by the building

entered.detail: traditional Japanese-style red lanterns hanging under the overhang
white police vehicle with blue and red lights parked on the plaza
dark truck with yellow biohazard symbols and warning stripes
plastic tables and chairs in red and blue arranged on the concrete
wide concrete stairs with red metal railings leading upward
wall covered in colorful graffiti and street art

segments.scene_description: The character enters a semi-covered plaza decorated with red paper lanterns. A police car and biohazard truck are parked near outdoor seating where NPCs sit at tables. The character then approaches and begins ascending a concrete staircase with red railings, passing graffiti-covered walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper walkway with billboards leading to narrow alley

events.description: emerges onto upper walkway with large illuminated billboards
enters narrow alleyway between tall buildings

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper level past billboards, then descending through a narrow alleyway

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in colorful jacket walking ahead in the alley

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement showing a beach scene with text
tall concrete wall with graffiti on the left side of the passage
tall concrete wall with pipes and vents on the right side
steam rising from a grate in the ground

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an upper walkway featuring large billboards including one advertising 'sunny Somalia.' The scene transitions into a narrow, enclosed alleyway with graffiti-covered walls and steam rising from vents. The lighting becomes darker and more atmospheric with neon signs visible in the distance.

events.description: emerges from dark alley into brighter street level area with visible sky
crosses the street at a crosswalk with other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: ascending stairs from the alley, then crossing a busy street at the crosswalk with other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: black car driving through the intersection

entered.detail: yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing on the asphalt
traffic signals suspended over the intersection
elevated train track structure running above the street

segments.scene_description: The character ascends from the narrow alley into a more open street-level area with visible sky and brighter ambient light. The character crosses a street at a marked crosswalk, sharing the space with other pedestrians and watching for vehicles. Overhead monorail tracks and traffic lights frame the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved commercial street with neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking along the curved sidewalk past various storefronts and neon signs

entered.detail: large circular neon sign with 'KIROSHI' text and target logo
winding road with red curbs and yellow lane markings
tangle of electrical and communication wires crossing above the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a curved city street lined with commercial buildings and dense neon signage. The prominent Kiroshi sign with its circular target logo dominates the view ahead. The street features typical cyberpunk urban elements including overhead wires, various storefronts, and moderate pedestrian traffic.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense cyberpunk cityscape that shifts from the shadow of massive infrastructure into a vibrant, neon-lit commercial district. It begins with the character walking along a street beneath a towering overpass, where red road markings and glowing billboards frame the path. As the character moves forward, the scene opens into a semi-covered plaza adorned with red paper lanterns and parked emergency vehicles before ascending a graffiti-covered concrete staircase. The camera then follows the character along an upper walkway and through a narrow, steam-filled alleyway, where the lighting dims and becomes more atmospheric. Finally, the view expands as the character emerges from the alley to cross a busy intersection under monorail tracks, eventually curving along a bright street dominated by dense commercial signage and a prominent Kiroshi logo.
